zh.lifeSummary: Robert Bennett是John Bennett和Margery的兒子，於1533年7月10日出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓 甸尼。他於1558年7月10日與Elizabeth Edney在英國薩默塞特維維利斯可姆結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1603年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特維維利斯可姆享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特維維利斯可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert Bennett是John Bennett和Margery的儿子，于1533年7月10日出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓 甸尼。他于1558年7月10日与Elizabeth Edney在英国薩默塞特維維利斯可姆结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1603年在英国英格兰薩默塞特維維利斯可姆享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特維維利斯可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Bennett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the medieval personal name Benedict , from Latin Benedictus ‘blessed’. In the 12th century the Latin form of the name is found in England alongside versions derived from the Old French form Beneit, Benoit, which was common among the Normans. The surname has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Bernhard  .
Altered form of French Benet or Bennet or of some other similar (like-sounding) French surname. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

variants.name: Bennetts
meanings: English (Cornwall): variant of Bennett , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Dittus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Fritz, Kurt, Otto, Reinhold.
German: from a vernacular short form of the Latin personal name Benedictus (see Bennett ).

variants.name: Benedict
meanings: English, German, and Dutch: from the personal name Benedict, from Latin Benedictus ‘blessed’. This owed its popularity in the Middle Ages chiefly to Saint Benedict of Norcia (c. 480–550), who founded the Benedictine order of monks at Monte Cassino and wrote a monastic rule that formed a model for all subsequent rules. No doubt the meaning of the Latin word also contributed to its popularity as a personal name, especially in Romance countries. Occasionally the English surname may derive from Latin benedicite ‘bless (you)’, perhaps given as a nickname to an habitual user of the expression. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed the German variant Benedikt and many cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Benedek , Slovenian Benedik (see Benedick ), and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Italian Benedetti .

variants.name: Bennight
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Bennett  .

variants.name: Bennison
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Bene(i)t + -son. See Bennett and compare Benson .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Robert Bennett was born on 10 July 1533, in Taunton Deane, Somerset, England, United Kingdom as the son of John Bennett and Margery. He married Elizabeth Edney on 10 July 1558, in Wiveliscombe, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1603, in Wiveliscombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Wiveliscombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Bennett est né le 10 juillet 1533, à Taunton Deane, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de John Bennett et Margery. Il a épousé Elizabeth Edney le 10 juillet 1558, à Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1603, à Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Robert Bennett wurde am 10. Juli 1533 in Taunton Deane, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von John Bennett und Margery geboren. Er hat am 10. Juli 1558 in Wiveliscombe, Somerset, England Elizabeth Edney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1603 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Wiveliscombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wiveliscombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Robert Bennett è nato il il 10 luglio 1533 nel Taunton Deane, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di John Bennett e Margery. Lui sposato Elizabeth Edney il 10 luglio 1558, nel Wiveliscombe, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1603, nel Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Bennettは1533年7月10日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントン ディーンでJohn BennettとMargeryの息子として生まれた。1558年7月10日にイギリスソメルセトウィベリスコンベでElizabeth Edneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1603年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウィベリスコンベで70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトウィベリスコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Bennett(은)는 1533년 7월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴 디인에서 John Bennett(와)과 Margery의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1558년 7월 10일 영국 서머세트 위벨리스코브에서 Elizabeth Edney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1603년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 위벨리스코브에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 위벨리스코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert Bennett nasceu em 10 de julho de 1533, em Taunton Deane, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de John Bennett e Margery. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Edney em 10 de julho de 1558, em Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1603, em Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert Bennett родился 10 июля 1533 г. в местности таунтон дин, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали John Bennett и Margery. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Edney 10 июля 1558 г. в местности вивелискомб, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1603 г. в местности вивелискомб, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности вивелискомб, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Robert Bennett nació el 10 de julio de 1533, en Taunton Deane, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de John Bennett y Margery. Se casó con Elizabeth Edney el 10 de julio de 1558, en Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1603, en Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Wiveliscombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
